_comment: Declarative fin-api endpoint registry. Consumed by build.sh — adds an endpoint = adds an entry here, NEVER edit build.sh.

endpoints.name: info
endpoints.description: Build info + DataHub counts {version, personas, mcp_tools, hub_topics}

endpoints.name: personas
endpoints.description: Investor persona registry (buffett, graham, klarman, lynch, marks, munger)

endpoints.name: mcp_tools
endpoints.description: MCP tool registry with input_schema (economics_data, factor_backtest, financial_news, market_data, symbol_search)

_parameterized_endpoints_not_snapshotted: GET  /api/v1/ws                      (WebSocket — out of scope for snapshot)
